spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 3 of 3 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles several edge cases (errors, fallbacks, feature detection, denials) — not just the happy path.

references.rationale: Concept page now cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/5159559872249856 reference link and the JS Self-Profiling specification.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome 148 verification exercised the main-thread profiler, worker profiler fallback, and comparison controls. Main-thread Profiler construction and trace parsing worked, including unstacked/native samples that are now shown as a no-JS-stack trace row instead of disappearing from the flame chart. Blob dedicated workers reported Profiler as unavailable and the page surfaced that fallback without runtime errors. The required ChromeStatus reference is present, labels are associated with controls, and the conformance suite now checks the real worker exposure contract instead of a broad Worker baseline.
